untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition of 'twin bottoms' with specific geometric properties (1% price separation, 64-day spacing, 29% rise between bottoms, narrow downward spikes). These multi-bar structural patterns cannot be expressed as single-bar indicator comparisons using the allowed operators and indicators. Double Bottom pattern detection requires historical sequence analysis and peak/trough identification logic not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using pivot-based breakout (close > pivot resistance) and volume confirmation (higher volume on right bottom). However, core pattern recognition elements (twin bottom identification, day-count spacing, precise price alignment within 1%) are untranslatable. A full implementation would require custom pattern-matching logic. Stop loss set conservatively at 5% given failure_rate_5pct=5%. Hold period approximated at 60 days based on stated 64-day separation.
